title: GSR 584E Corrigendum in page 3 para 30 of GSR 473E dated 22 June 2000
description: GSR 584E Corrigendum in page 3 para 30 of GSR 473E dated 22 June 2000
text: EXTRAORDINARY PART II-Section 3-Sub-section (l) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY NEW DELHI, TUESDAY , JULY 4, 2000/ASADHA 13, 1922 Ministry of External Affairs (CPV Division) Corrigendum New Delhi, 12 June, 2000 G.S.R. 584(E)- The following change has been made in the page 3, para 30 of the notification published vide G.S.R. 473(E) in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary part-Il, section 3, sub section (i) dated 22.05.2000. 1 2 3 4 30 Out of turn issue of fresh (Tatkal) passport within eleven to thirty five days of application. Rs. 1,0001- plus time to time applicable passport fees. Rs. 2,2501- plus time to time applicable passport fees. [File No. VIl401l38/98] S.R. Tayal, Joint Secretary (CPV) Note:-- Principle rules were published vide G.S.R. 567(E) dated 11 December, 1980 (1980 Foreign) in part II, section3, sub section (i) and furthur amended as under:- 1.
